mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (product_code, product_name, price, stock_quantity, category) VALUES (#{productCode}, #{productName}, #{price}, #{stockQuantity}, #{category})

INSERT INTO product (product_code, product_name, price, stock_quantity, category) VALUES (#{productCode}, #{productName}, #{price}, #{stockQuantity}, #{category}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE product_name = VALUES(product_name), price = VALUES(price), stock_quantity = VALUES(stock_quantity), category = VALUES(category)

INSERT INTO product (product_code, product_name, price, stock_quantity, category) VALUES
(#{product.productCode}, #{product.productName}, #{product.price}, #{product.stockQuantity}, #{product.category})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE product_name = VALUES(product_name), price = VALUES(price), stock_quantity = VALUES(stock_quantity), category = VALUES(category)
